tool.name: list_installable_tools
tool.description: List tools that can be installed on-demand via curated recipes (apt/pipx/go install/gem).

tool.name: install_tool_on_demand
tool.description:
Request installation of a known pentest tool into the sandbox.
Uses curated install recipes — the tool name must match an entry in list_installable_tools. Gated by command safety system: apt/pipx installs trigger APPROVAL_REQUIRED unless ZIRO_AUTO_APPROVE_COMMANDS=1.
After install, call detect_capabilities(refresh=True) to refresh the manifest.
